title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services:
Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India Holdings Services!
